headline: Federal Reserve signals two more rate cuts in 2026
description: Fed Chair indicates inflation progress supports continued easing cycle through year-end.

headline: ECB cuts rates to 2.5% as eurozone growth stalls
description: European Central Bank accelerates easing amid weak manufacturing data across the bloc.

headline: US and China reach partial trade agreement on tech exports
description: Both nations agree to reduce tariffs on semiconductor equipment and consumer electronics.

headline: Middle East tensions ease after diplomatic breakthrough
description: Gulf states announce cooperation framework reducing oil supply disruption risks.

headline: US jobs report shows 280K new positions in February
description: Labor market remains resilient despite tightening conditions in technology sector.

headline: US ISM manufacturing index returns to expansion at 52.1
description: First expansion reading in three months suggests factory sector stabilization.

headline: EU imposes new tariffs on Chinese electric vehicles
description: 25% duties on Chinese EV imports take effect amid overcapacity concerns.

headline: Bank of Japan raises rates to 1% in surprise move
description: Yen strengthens as BOJ tightens policy faster than markets anticipated.

headline: US consumer confidence drops to 6-month low
description: Conference Board index declines as households worry about job security and inflation.

headline: Russia-Ukraine ceasefire talks collapse
description: Failed negotiations raise concerns about prolonged conflict and energy market disruption.

headline: US GDP growth revised up to 3.2% for Q4 2025
description: Stronger consumer spending and business investment drive upward revision.

headline: India raises tariffs on US agricultural imports
description: Retaliatory trade measures escalate bilateral tensions between the two economies.

headline: Fed minutes reveal debate over pace of rate cuts
description: Some FOMC members favor slower easing path citing persistent services inflation.

headline: Global PMI signals synchronized expansion across major economies
description: Manufacturing activity turns positive in US Europe and Asia simultaneously for first time in 18 months.

headline: Taiwan Strait military exercises raise market anxiety
description: Chinese naval drills near Taiwan trigger brief sell-off in Asian and US equity markets.

headline: US inflation falls to 2.3% supporting rate cut expectations
description: Core CPI declines for fourth consecutive month approaching Fed 2% target.

headline: USMCA review highlights auto sector trade frictions
description: US Mexico and Canada disagree on EV content rules during scheduled agreement review.

headline: Global central banks signal coordinated easing cycle
description: G7 central bankers acknowledge aligned policy direction toward lower interest rates.

headline: China GDP growth slows to 4.2% amid property crisis
description: Real estate sector contraction continues to drag on broader Chinese economic activity.

headline: OPEC extends production cuts through Q2 2026
description: Oil cartel agrees to maintain supply restrictions to support crude prices above $70.

headline: US retail sales decline 0.5% in January
description: Seasonal weakness and storm disruptions dampen consumer spending at start of year.

headline: US proposes new semiconductor export controls on China
description: Expanded restrictions target advanced AI chip sales and manufacturing equipment.

headline: Federal Reserve cuts rates by 25 basis points to 3.75%
description: Eighth consecutive meeting with dovish tone as inflation continues gradual decline.

headline: Eurozone unemployment falls to record low of 6.1%
description: Tight labor markets persist across Europe despite slowing economic growth.

headline: Oil prices spike on Red Sea shipping disruptions
description: Houthi attacks on commercial vessels force rerouting of tankers around Africa.
